name: GOLFTEC North Raleigh
about: GOLFTEC North Raleigh provides a data-driven golf instruction and fitting experience centered on advanced technology. Their core offerings include golf lessons utilizing OPTIMOTION motion tracking and high-speed video analysis, complemented by club fitting services that utilize launch monitors and shaft optimization. The venue is designed as an indoor training facility with a focus on personalized coaching and practice memberships.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven lessons using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Access to practice memberships with launch monitors and video feedback
Professional club fitting services that optimize equipment for individual swings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs, and GOLFTEC also provides clubs for use during lessons and fittings.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The provided content does not specify a policy on outside food and drink. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on lessons, practice, and club fitting rather than playing full 18-hole rounds on a simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, but the environment is primarily geared towards focused instruction and practice.
